highlights.title: Update for Omnipod, Medtrum, and G7 sensor
changes: Trio now includes updated Omnipod and Medtrum components.
G7 sensor support was updated to show the sensor lifecycle.

sources.title: nightscout/Trio#1257: Patch Release v0.8.4 — Bump Submodules MedtrumKit, OmnipodKit, G7SensorKit

items.title: Sync v0.8.4 patch back to development
changes: The v0.8.4 patch branch was merged back into the development branch.
No specific user-facing changes are documented in this merge.

sources.title: nightscout/Trio#1258: Patch Release v0.8.4 — Sync back to Dev

includedPullRequests.title: Patch Release v0.8.4 — Bump Submodules MedtrumKit, OmnipodKit, G7SensorKit
includedPullRequests.body:
Bump MedtrumKit
* https://github.com/jbr7rr/MedtrumKit/pull/124
* https://github.com/jbr7rr/MedtrumKit/pull/129
* https://github.com/jbr7rr/MedtrumKit/pull/131
* https://github.com/jbr7rr/MedtrumKit/pull/134
* https://github.com/jbr7rr/MedtrumKit/pull/138
* https://github.com/jbr7rr/MedtrumKit/pull/147
* https://github.com/jbr7rr/MedtrumKit/pull/148
* https://github.com/jbr7rr/MedtrumKit/pull/151
* https://github.com/jbr7rr/MedtrumKit/pull/157

Bump OmnipodKit
* https://github.com/loopandlearn/OmnipodKit/pull/93
* https://github.com/loopandlearn/OmnipodKit/pull/95
* https://github.com/loopandlearn/OmnipodKit/pull/99 (fixes #1236)

Bump G7SensorKit
* Update G7SensorKit to show the lifecycle https://github.com/LoopKit/G7SensorKit/pull/58
